# CWE-358 vulnerable — Improperly Implemented Security Check for Standard
lang: go
file: CWE-358-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/base64"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

func ParseAccessToken(c *GinCtx) map[string]interface{} {
	raw := c.Request.Header.Get("Authorization")
	token := strings.TrimPrefix(raw, "Bearer ")
	parts := strings.Split(token, ".")
	payload, _ := base64.RawURLEncoding.DecodeString(parts[1])
	var claims map[string]interface{}
	_ = json.Unmarshal(payload, &claims)
	return claims
}
